recommendations.title: Band Aid
recommendations.overview: A couple who can't stop fighting embark on a last-ditch effort to save their marriage: turning their fights into songs and starting a band.

recommendations.title: Turbo Kid
recommendations.overview: In a post-apocalyptic wasteland, an orphaned teen must battle a ruthless warlord to save the girl of his dreams.
recommendations.director: François Simard, Anouk Whissell, Yoann-Karl Whissell

recommendations.title: White Water Summer
recommendations.overview: When the experienced guide Vic accompanies the city boy Alan and his three friends on their first wilderness experience, he not only hopes to teach the four boys lessons about the wilderness, but about themselves. Vic pushes them to the limit. Soon a

recommendations.title: The Craft: Legacy
recommendations.overview: An eclectic foursome of aspiring teenage witches get more than they bargained for as they lean into their newfound powers.

recommendations.title: La Jetée
recommendations.overview: A man confronts his past during an experiment that attempts to find a solution to the problems of a post-apocalyptic world caused by a world war.

recommendations.title: Final Flight of the Osiris
recommendations.overview: Immediately before the events of The Matrix Reloaded, the crew of the hovercraft Osiris discovers a quarter of a million sentinels drilling through the surface of the earth towards the last human city of Zion. But can the Osiris survive long enough t

recommendations.title: The Survivalist
recommendations.overview: In a time of starvation, a survivalist lives off a small plot of land hidden deep in forest. When two women seeking food and shelter discover his farm, he finds his existence threatened.

recommendations.title: Damnation Alley
recommendations.overview: Following World War III, four survivors at an desert military installation attempt to drive across the desolate wasteland of America to Albany, where they hope more survivors are living, using a specially built vehicles to protect themselves against

recommendations.title: Finch
recommendations.overview: On a post-apocalyptic Earth, a robot, built to protect the life of his dying creator's beloved dog, learns about life, love, friendship, and what it means to be human.

recommendations.title: Memphis Belle
